text: I find myself enveloped by a sense of inquisitiveness and anticipation. The bright, modern space with its bold colors and thoughtful displays hints at the exploration of ideas and the celebration of progress—R + D, research and development, shaping our coexistence with technology. I feel both small and significant here, as if I am a note in a symphony of human ingenuity. Curiosity and wonder well up within me, eager to discover what insights lie just beyond this glass.
